caption:
What if the Hanuman Chalisa was a comic your child couldn't put down?

40 verses. 40 illustrated pages.
Three panels per verse — the story, the scripture, the feeling.
Devanagari, Telugu, and English on every page.

We've been reciting the Chalisa for generations.
Now your child can see it.

📖 Available on Pothi.com → link in bio

#HanumanChalisa #JaiHanuman #BajrangBali #SanatanDharma #IndianArt #MythologyArt #DevotionalArt #HinduCulture #EpicArt #ComicBook #IndianComics #KidsBooks #IndianParenting #HinduKids #Viral #Trending #ExploreIndia #InstagramIndia #FYP #HanumanJi

Why did I make this book?

Because I once read the Hanuman Chalisa in a book that had pictures alongside the words.
And it stayed with me far longer than words alone ever had.

This book is that memory — turned into something your child can hold.

Every parent who recites the Chalisa knows this problem:
the child sits there, not understanding, waiting for it to end.

What if instead — they leaned in?

📖 The Hanuman Chalisa Comic — link in bio

#HanumanChalisa #JaiHanuman #BajrangBali #SanatanDharma #IndianArt #MythologyArt #DevotionalArt #HinduCulture #EpicArt #ComicBook #IndianComics #KidsBooks #IndianParenting #HinduKids #Viral #Trending #ExploreIndia #InstagramIndia #FYP #HanumanJi

Before the Chalisa begins, Tulsidas stops.

He doesn't start with power or poetry.
He starts with humility.

श्री गुरु चरण सरोज रज, निज मनु मुकुरु सुधारि।
बरनउँ रघुबर बिमल जसु, जो दायकु फल चारि॥

"With the dust of my Guru's lotus feet, I cleanse the mirror of my mind.
Then I sing the pure glory of Ram."

I am a fool. My mind is clouded.
With my teacher's grace, I will try.

500 years later, we are still reading what that humble man wrote.

This is the lesson before the first verse even starts:
begin with honesty about your limits.

📖 The Hanuman Chalisa Comic — link in bio

#HanumanChalisa #JaiHanuman #BajrangBali #SanatanDharma #IndianArt #MythologyArt #DevotionalArt #HinduCulture #EpicArt #ComicBook #IndianComics #KidsBooks #IndianParenting #HinduKids #Viral #Trending #ExploreIndia #InstagramIndia #FYP #HanumanJi

From high above, Hanuman blazes at the center of a vast cosmic ocean — golden, radiant, immovable. Ancient scrolls and sacred texts spiral around him like planets orbiting a sun, each manuscript glowing with the light of eternal knowledge. His mace rests in one hand while the other is raised in blessing, and the entire universe seems to revolve around him in deep teal and molten gold.

━━━━━━━━━━
जय हनुमान ज्ञान गुण सागर, जय कपीश तिहुँ लोक उजागर।
"Victory to Hanuman — ocean of wisdom and virtue. Victory to the lord of monkeys, whose light shines across all three worlds."
━━━━━━━━━━

The scrolls orbiting him are not decoration — they are his nature. He is the ocean from which all wisdom flows.

#HanumanChalisa #JaiHanuman #BajrangBali #SanatanDharma #IndianArt #MythologyArt #DevotionalArt #HinduCulture #EpicArt #ComicBook #IndianComics #KidsBooks #IndianParenting #HinduKids #Viral #Trending #ExploreIndia #InstagramIndia #FYP #HanumanJi

A burning crimson sunset floods the sky and Hanuman stands tall, crowned in gold, his floral garland radiant against the fiery horizon. Behind him stretches an ocean of kneeling monkey warriors — thousands upon thousands bowing in reverence, their flags dotting the amber light. His gaze is distant and serene, carrying the weight of all three worlds in his quiet dignity.

━━━━━━━━━━
जय हनुमान ज्ञान गुण सागर, जय कपीश तिहुँ लोक उजागर।
"Victory to Hanuman — ocean of wisdom and virtue. Victory to the lord of monkeys, whose light shines across all three worlds."
━━━━━━━━━━

He is Kapeesha — lord of the vanaras — and even the blazing sun bows behind him as his army salutes.

#HanumanChalisa #JaiHanuman #BajrangBali #SanatanDharma #IndianArt #MythologyArt #DevotionalArt #HinduCulture #EpicArt #ComicBook #IndianComics #KidsBooks #IndianParenting #HinduKids #Viral #Trending #ExploreIndia #InstagramIndia #FYP #HanumanJi

A pillar of divine white light erupts from earth to heaven as Hanuman stands in its center — his hand raised in abhaya mudra, his mace gleaming gold. Below him, demons cower in darkness; above, the entire pantheon watches in awe — Shiva, Parvati, Ganesha, celestial elephants and gods assembling in the clouds. Mortals on the earth reach upward, their faces lit by his radiance, unable to look away.

━━━━━━━━━━
जय हनुमान ज्ञान गुण सागर, जय कपीश तिहुँ लोक उजागर।
"Victory to Hanuman — ocean of wisdom and virtue. Victory to the lord of monkeys, whose light shines across all three worlds."
━━━━━━━━━━

His light does not choose — it illuminates all three worlds at once: the heavens above, the earth between, and the darkness below.

#HanumanChalisa #JaiHanuman #BajrangBali #SanatanDharma #IndianArt #MythologyArt #DevotionalArt #HinduCulture #EpicArt #ComicBook #IndianComics #KidsBooks #IndianParenting #HinduKids #Viral #Trending #ExploreIndia #InstagramIndia #FYP #HanumanJi

By torchlight in a forest camp, Hanuman kneels before his lord — humble, open-palmed, his ornate crown glowing in the warm amber dark. Ram extends a ring toward him, the sacred token of trust placed into the hand of the one being chosen. Vanara soldiers wait silently in the shadows behind, witnesses to this solemn commission between a king and his most faithful messenger.

━━━━━━━━━━
राम दूत अतुलित बलधामा, अंजनि-पुत्र पवनसुत नामा।
"Ram's messenger, of incomparable strength. Son of Anjani, born of the wind."
━━━━━━━━━━

This is the moment Ram's doot is chosen — strength and devotion bowing together in one golden palm.

📖 The Hanuman Chalisa Comic — link in bio

#HanumanChalisa #JaiHanuman #BajrangBali #SanatanDharma #IndianArt #MythologyArt #DevotionalArt #HinduCulture #EpicArt #ComicBook #IndianComics #KidsBooks #IndianParenting #HinduKids #Viral #Trending #ExploreIndia #InstagramIndia #FYP #HanumanJi

A single golden hand — massive, bracelet-adorned, draped in bronze fur — thrusts upward and holds an entire mountain of stone against a pale grey sky. Pebbles rain down from the boulder's edges as it is held aloft with ease, the way a child holds a pebble. This is not effort — this is nature. The strength of the wind made flesh.

━━━━━━━━━━
राम दूत अतुलित बलधामा, अंजनि-पुत्र पवनसुत नामा।
"Ram's messenger, of incomparable strength. Son of Anjani, born of the wind."
━━━━━━━━━━

Atulita — incomparable. No scale exists to measure what this hand can carry.

#HanumanChalisa #JaiHanuman #BajrangBali #SanatanDharma #IndianArt #MythologyArt #DevotionalArt #HinduCulture #EpicArt #ComicBook #IndianComics #KidsBooks #IndianParenting #HinduKids #Viral #Trending #ExploreIndia #InstagramIndia #FYP #HanumanJi

Under a full silver moon, mother Anjani sits on a mountaintop cradling her luminous golden infant — the newborn Hanuman radiates warmth and light from within, as if the sun itself has been swaddled in her arms. Behind them, the great form of Shiva looms in the night sky like a gentle mountain, his presence flowing down to bless this moment in a ribbon of light. The stars bear witness to this divine birth.

━━━━━━━━━━
राम दूत अतुलित बलधामा, अंजनि-पुत्र पवनसुत नामा।
"Ram's messenger, of incomparable strength. Son of Anjani, born of the wind."
━━━━━━━━━━

Anjani-putra — Anjani's son. Born of mortal love and divine grace, this child will reshape the world.

#HanumanChalisa #JaiHanuman #BajrangBali #SanatanDharma #IndianArt #MythologyArt #DevotionalArt #HinduCulture #EpicArt #ComicBook #IndianComics #KidsBooks #IndianParenting #HinduKids #Viral #Trending #ExploreIndia #InstagramIndia #FYP #HanumanJi

Lightning tears the sky apart behind him and Hanuman charges forward, his golden mace swinging in a blazing arc of fire and fury. His body is coiled like a thunderbolt about to strike — jaw set, eyes fierce, jeweled crown blazing in the storm light. Chunks of earth fly in all directions, and the darkness itself seems to crack open wherever his mace sweeps.

━━━━━━━━━━
महाबीर बिक्रम बजरंगी, कुमति निवार सुमति के संगी।
"Great hero, valiant, with limbs of lightning. Remover of evil thoughts — companion of the virtuous."
━━━━━━━━━━

Bajrangi — limbs forged from Indra's own thunderbolt. When he moves, the sky itself cannot keep pace.

📖 The Hanuman Chalisa Comic — link in bio

#HanumanChalisa #JaiHanuman #BajrangBali #SanatanDharma #IndianArt #MythologyArt #DevotionalArt #HinduCulture #EpicArt #ComicBook #IndianComics #KidsBooks #IndianParenting #HinduKids #Viral #Trending #ExploreIndia #InstagramIndia #FYP #HanumanJi

In the center of absolute darkness, a single sphere of golden light holds steady — and within it, Hanuman sits in perfect stillness, cross-legged, mace resting at his side, one hand raised in protection. Dark demonic shapes writhe and claw at the edges of his light, but cannot enter. The contrast is absolute: chaos circling, peace reigning at the center.

━━━━━━━━━━
महाबीर बिक्रम बजरंगी, कुमति निवार सुमति के संगी।
"Great hero, valiant, with limbs of lightning. Remover of evil thoughts — companion of the virtuous."
━━━━━━━━━━

He does not need to fight darkness — his presence alone dissolves it. This is what it means to be kumati nivar.

📖 The Hanuman Chalisa Comic — link in bio

#HanumanChalisa #JaiHanuman #BajrangBali #SanatanDharma #IndianArt #MythologyArt #DevotionalArt #HinduCulture #EpicArt #ComicBook #IndianComics #KidsBooks #IndianParenting #HinduKids #Viral #Trending #ExploreIndia #InstagramIndia #FYP #HanumanJi

An intimate moment caught in warm firelight — Hanuman's golden hand rests gently on the shoulder of a young man bearing a tilak on his forehead, his eyes lit with wonder and gratitude. The two faces are turned toward each other in quiet recognition, the gap between devotee and deity dissolving in this single touch. It is the look of someone being seen, truly seen, for the first time.

━━━━━━━━━━
महाबीर बिक्रम बजरंगी, कुमति निवार सुमति के संगी।
"Great hero, valiant, with limbs of lightning. Remover of evil thoughts — companion of the virtuous."
━━━━━━━━━━

Sumati ke sangi — companion of the virtuous. He walks beside those who seek the good, as close as a hand on the shoulder.

#HanumanChalisa #JaiHanuman #BajrangBali #SanatanDharma #IndianArt #MythologyArt #DevotionalArt #HinduCulture #EpicArt #ComicBook #IndianComics #KidsBooks #IndianParenting #HinduKids #Viral #Trending #ExploreIndia #InstagramIndia #FYP #HanumanJi

A portrait of majesty — Hanuman stands in a golden temple, his skin luminous and warm, his floral garland cascading in red, white and green over a powerful chest. His gaze is calm and commanding, eyes soft yet ancient, as lamplight traces every curve of his ornate crown and jeweled necklace. There is no action here, only presence — and that presence fills the entire frame.

━━━━━━━━━━
कंचन बरन बिराज सुबेसा, कानन कुण्डल कुंचित केशा।
"Golden complexion, beautifully adorned. Earrings in ears, curly hair."
━━━━━━━━━━

Kanchan baran — a complexion like molten gold. Every verse of adornment is a truth this image wears on its skin.

An extreme close-up on a single ornament — a disc of hammered gold inlaid with a deep crimson gemstone at its center, its petals and borders etched with exquisite precision, resting against the warm amber fur of Hanuman's ear. Golden droplets hang from its base, swaying with divine weight. It is a universe of craft captured in a single jewel.

━━━━━━━━━━
कंचन बरन बिराज सुबेसा, कानन कुण्डल कुंचित केशा।
"Golden complexion, beautifully adorned. Earrings in ears, curly hair."
━━━━━━━━━━

Kanan kundal — earrings in his ears. The Chalisa sees even the smallest detail; nothing of his beauty goes unsung.

Looking down from above onto a bowed head — the crown of Hanuman's elaborate golden mukut dominates the frame, its concentric tiers of intricate metalwork rising like a temple above a cascade of dark, tightly curled hair. Floral garlands peek at the edges in saffron and cream, and the warm glow of gold suffuses everything. This is devotion seen from above — and it is magnificent.

━━━━━━━━━━
कंचन बरन बिराज सुबेसा, कानन कुण्डल कुंचित केशा।
"Golden complexion, beautifully adorned. Earrings in ears, curly hair."
━━━━━━━━━━

Kunchit kesha — those beloved curling locks, crowned in gold, a mark of beauty that Tulsidas himself could not stop describing.

📖 The Hanuman Chalisa Comic — link in bio

#HanumanChalisa #JaiHanuman #BajrangBali #SanatanDharma #IndianArt #MythologyArt #DevotionalArt #HinduCulture #EpicArt #ComicBook #IndianComics #KidsBooks #IndianParenting #HinduKids #Viral #Trending #ExploreIndia #InstagramIndia #FYP #HanumanJi

Against a sky split with blue lightning, the sacred golden mace sits alone on a stone altar — its carved surface glowing, encrusted with emeralds and rubies, electric arcs dancing around its head like a crown of power. The carved temple walls behind it frame it like a deity in its own right. This weapon does not wait to be swung — it waits to be worthy of.

━━━━━━━━━━
हाथ बज्र औ ध्वजा बिराजै, काँधे मूँज जनेऊ साजै।
"In his hands: the thunderbolt and the victory flag. On his shoulder: the sacred thread of learning."
━━━━━━━━━━

Haath bajra — in his hand, the thunderbolt. Before the warrior appears, his weapon announces him.

A saffron battle flag explodes against a turbulent amber sky, billowing and snapping in a wind that seems to carry war and victory in equal measure. Below it, a fur-covered hand grips the gilded pole with absolute certainty — gold bangles catching the last fire of a setting sun that burns through the storm clouds behind. The flag is not a symbol — it is a declaration.

━━━━━━━━━━
हाथ बज्र औ ध्वजा बिराजै, काँधे मूँज जनेऊ साजै।
"In his hands: the thunderbolt and the victory flag. On his shoulder: the sacred thread of learning."
━━━━━━━━━━

Dhwaja birajai — the victory flag aloft. Wherever Hanuman plants this flag, Ram's sovereignty follows.

The most intimate detail — a close view of Hanuman's broad golden shoulder where a simple white cord of munja grass crosses like a quiet vow. The earring glints above it, the saffron cloth drapes beside it, and a single bead of moisture rests on the cord, as if even this humble thread knows the weight it carries. Golden light bathes everything in reverence.

━━━━━━━━━━
हाथ बज्र औ ध्वजा बिराजै, काँधे मूँज जनेऊ साजै।
"In his hands: the thunderbolt and the victory flag. On his shoulder: the sacred thread of learning."
━━━━━━━━━━

Kandhe moonj janeu — the sacred thread on his shoulder. He is not only the warrior; he is the eternal student, wearing the mark of learning proudly.

Under a vast starlit sky, Lord Shiva sits in meditation atop a snow-crowned mountain — luminous, blue-skinned, cosmic — while below on the rocky earth, mother Anjani holds her glowing infant close. A ribbon of divine light streams down from Shiva to the child like a blessing made visible, bridging heaven and earth in a single golden thread. The night is cold but the light is warm.

━━━━━━━━━━
शंकर सुवन केसरी नंदन, तेज प्रताप महा जग वंदन।
"Born of Shankara, son of Kesari. Your radiance and glory are worshipped throughout the world."
━━━━━━━━━━

Shankar suvan — born of Shankara. That thread of light from Shiva to child is not metaphor — it is lineage made luminous.

📖 The Hanuman Chalisa Comic — link in bio

#HanumanChalisa #JaiHanuman #BajrangBali #SanatanDharma #IndianArt #MythologyArt #DevotionalArt #HinduCulture #EpicArt #ComicBook #IndianComics #KidsBooks #IndianParenting #HinduKids #Viral #Trending #ExploreIndia #InstagramIndia #FYP #HanumanJi

Hanuman gazes upward into a burst of golden light filtering through a forest canopy, his face radiant with pure joy and devotion — eyes wide, lips curling in a smile of absolute wonder. Above him, the feet of a divine figure glow in the light, and golden leaves shimmer around the moment like a living benediction. This is not worship performed — it is worship felt.

━━━━━━━━━━
शंकर सुवन केसरी नंदन, तेज प्रताप महा जग वंदन।
"Born of Shankara, son of Kesari. Your radiance and glory are worshipped throughout the world."
━━━━━━━━━━

Tej pratap maha jag vandan — his radiance is worshipped throughout the world, yet his own face glows brightest when looking upward at Ram.

Hanuman's silhouette stands on a hilltop, arm raised, mace in hand, backlit by a blazing corona of golden light that turns him into a living eclipse. All around him — elephants, lions, serpents, birds, celestial figures, monkey warriors — bow or gather in reverence, their own forms dwarfed by his scale and brilliance. The entire natural world has come to bear witness.

━━━━━━━━━━
शंकर सुवन केसरी नंदन, तेज प्रताप महा जग वंदन।
"Born of Shankara, son of Kesari. Your radiance and glory are worshipped throughout the world."
━━━━━━━━━━

Jag vandan — worshipped by the world. Not just by humans — every creature in creation bends toward his light.

📖 The Hanuman Chalisa Comic — link in bio

#HanumanChalisa #JaiHanuman #BajrangBali #SanatanDharma #IndianArt #MythologyArt #DevotionalArt #HinduCulture #EpicArt #ComicBook #IndianComics #KidsBooks #IndianParenting #HinduKids #Viral #Trending #ExploreIndia #InstagramIndia #FYP #HanumanJi

Surrounded by towers of ancient manuscripts stacked like golden walls, Hanuman sits absorbed in an open text, his brow furrowed in concentration, mace leaned carefully to the side. Lamplight spills across the pages and his garland glows in the green-gold forest light filtering through. He holds the book the way a warrior holds a weapon — with total intention and absolute respect.

━━━━━━━━━━
विद्यावान गुनी अति चातुर, राम काज करिबे को आतुर।
"Learned, virtuous, extraordinarily clever. Always eager to do Ram's work."
━━━━━━━━━━

Vidyavan — the learned one. His strength is matched only by his scholarship; he devours knowledge the way fire devours wood.

📖 The Hanuman Chalisa Comic — link in bio

#HanumanChalisa #JaiHanuman #BajrangBali #SanatanDharma #IndianArt #MythologyArt #DevotionalArt #HinduCulture #EpicArt #ComicBook #IndianComics #KidsBooks #IndianParenting #HinduKids #Viral #Trending #ExploreIndia #InstagramIndia #FYP #HanumanJi

He lunges forward in the golden afternoon light, jaw set, eyes locked with fierce focus on something just out of frame — his mace dragging behind him as he drops low, every muscle coiled for instant action. His garlands sway with the momentum of urgency. This is not aggression — this is readiness, the posture of someone who has been waiting for Ram's call and refuses to be a single second late.

━━━━━━━━━━
विद्यावान गुनी अति चातुर, राम काज करिबे को आतुर।
"Learned, virtuous, extraordinarily clever. Always eager to do Ram's work."
━━━━━━━━━━

Ram kaj karibe ko aatur — eager, always eager. His urgency for his lord's work is not duty; it is love in motion.

📖 The Hanuman Chalisa Comic — link in bio

An extreme close-up fills the entire frame with Hanuman's face — amber eyes burning with golden fire, the white and red tilak stark and certain on his brow, every strand of copper fur catching the light. Those eyes do not drift; they hold. Whatever they have found, they will not let go. This is the gaze of someone who has decided.

━━━━━━━━━━
विद्यावान गुनी अति चातुर, राम काज करिबे को आतुर।
"Learned, virtuous, extraordinarily clever. Always eager to do Ram's work."
━━━━━━━━━━

Ati chatur — extraordinarily clever. Behind those amber eyes runs a mind that has read everything and forgotten nothing.

📖 The Hanuman Chalisa Comic — link in bio

#HanumanChalisa #JaiHanuman #BajrangBali #SanatanDharma #IndianArt #MythologyArt #DevotionalArt #HinduCulture #EpicArt #ComicBook #IndianComics #KidsBooks #IndianParenting #HinduKids #Viral #Trending #ExploreIndia #InstagramIndia #FYP #HanumanJi

In a sun-dappled forest grove, Hanuman kneels with his back to us before Ram and Sita — Ram blue-skinned and serene, bow and quiver across his back, Sita golden and radiant beside him on temple steps. The light through the trees is tender and private, as though the forest itself has leaned in to listen. This is not a formal meeting — it is devotion finding its home.

━━━━━━━━━━
प्रभु चरित्र सुनिबे को रसिया, राम लखन सीता मन बसिया।
"Lover of hearing the Lord's stories. Ram, Lakshmana, and Sita live in his heart."
━━━━━━━━━━

On a misty cliff edge at golden dawn, Hanuman sits close to a despairing Sugriva — his hand placed gently on the grieving monkey king's shoulder, speaking with quiet certainty into his ear. The vast forested valley sprawls below them, the rising sun burning through morning haze, as if the light itself is responding to the counsel being given. Sugriva's posture speaks of loss; Hanuman's of unwavering hope.

Hanuman's greatest gift to Sugriva was not strength or strategy — it was the introduction to Ram, and through that, everything.

By the warm flicker of a single oil lamp on a dark stone floor, Hanuman leans close to Vibhishana — the demon prince who has chosen righteousness over power — speaking in a hushed, urgent tone, his hand extended in counsel. Vibhishana sits with his chin resting thoughtfully in his hand, the shadows of Lanka's city of lights glimmering in the distant darkness outside. This is the moment a kingdom's fate is decided in whispers.

Hanuman bows his head in reverent concentration, his large hands cupped gently together, cradling a golden signet ring engraved with a bow and arrow — Ram's ring. A single oil lamp burns beside him, casting warm amber light across his face and the sacred object. His expression is one of total focus, as though he is placing within himself not just a ring but the entirety of Ram's trust.
